name: subscription-billing-plan-orchestrator
description: T209 SubscriptionPlanOrchestrator — BILLING archetype. Integer-cents guard at ORDER 1, OCC write at ORDER 6. DPO: OCC_CONFLICT emits SubscriptionPlanPublicationFailed.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: integer-cents guard at ORDER 1, OCC write (not plain storeDocument), DNA-8 audit-before-enqueue
Retrieve BILLING arch pattern + integer-cents guard + OCC write + outbox patterns for T209
Break T209 into: IntegerCentsGuard(1) → SETNX(2) → OccRead(3) → IntervalValidation(4) → AuditWrite(5) → OccWrite(6) → Enqueue(7)

Generate subscription-plan-orchestrator.service.ts with: Number.isInteger(priceCents) at ORDER 1, storeDocumentWithOCC at ORDER 6 (not plain storeDocument), storeDocument(audit) BEFORE enqueue(SubscriptionPlanPublished). billingInterval validation at ORDER 4.
Named check validation: financial_op_idempotency, setnx_before_operation, store_before_enqueue, integer_cents_guard, occ_write_not_plain_store
Score generated code 0-100 against T209 iron rules: integer-cents at ORDER 1, OCC write not plain storeDocument, audit before enqueue
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=integer-cents-guard-first + storeDocumentWithOCC + audit-before-enqueue, rejected=float-price-accepted OR plain-storeDocument OR enqueue-before-audit.
nodes.discriminatingConstraint: float-price-accepted OR plain-storeDocument(not OCC) OR enqueue-before-audit receives score=0 and triggers n3 re-iteration. Correct implementation requires: Number.isInteger(priceCents) at ORDER 1 + storeDocumentWithOCC at ORDER 6 + storeDocument(audit) BEFORE enqueue(SubscriptionPlanPublished).
